protein_name: Phosphorylates specifically ribosomal protein S6. Seems to act downstream of mTOR signaling in response to growth factors and nutrients to promote cell proliferation, cell growth and cell cycle progression in an alternative pathway regulated by MEAK7. Belongs to the protein kinase superfamily. AGC Ser/Thr protein kinase family. S6 kinase subfamily. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
